tasks.subject: Migrate device add command to apps/pt-cli using commander.js
tasks.description:
Extract device add logic from pt-control and create new command file at apps/pt-cli/src/commands/device/add.ts using commander.js pattern. Include:
- Port spec argument
- Device model argument  
- Interactive prompts for device models
- PTController integration
- Output formatting support (JSON, text)
- Error handling with CLIError classes

tasks.subject: Migrate device remove command to apps/pt-cli using commander.js
tasks.description:
Extract device remove logic from pt-control and create new command file at apps/pt-cli/src/commands/device/remove.ts using commander.js pattern. Include:
- Device name argument
- Force flag for skipping confirmation
- Destructive action confirmation
- PTController integration
- Output formatting support
- Error handling

tasks.subject: Migrate link add command to apps/pt-cli using commander.js
tasks.description:
Extract link add logic from pt-control and create new command file at apps/pt-cli/src/commands/link/add.ts using commander.js pattern. Include:
- Port spec arguments (port1, port2)
- Cable type flag with options
- Port spec validation helper
- Device list for interactive prompts
- PTController integration
- Auto-fallback to straight cable type
- Output formatting support

tasks.subject: Migrate link remove command to apps/pt-cli using commander.js
tasks.description:
Extract link remove logic from pt-control and create new command file at apps/pt-cli/src/commands/link/remove.ts using commander.js pattern. Include:
- Port spec argument
- Force flag for skipping confirmation  
- Destructive action confirmation
- Port spec validation
- PTController integration
- Output formatting support
- Error handling

tasks.subject: Migrate config ios command to apps/pt-cli using commander.js
tasks.description:
Extract config ios logic from pt-control and create new command file at apps/pt-cli/src/commands/config-ios.ts using commander.js pattern. Include:
- Device name argument
- Commands flag (multiple)
- File flag for reading commands
- Save flag (default true)
- File reading with filtering
- Device validation
- PTController integration
- Output formatting support
- Error handling

tasks.subject: Create utility functions for command orchestration
tasks.description:
Create reusable utility functions for:
- Port spec validation and parsing
- Device list fetching and caching
- Spinner and visual feedback wrappers
- Destructive action confirmation
- Device model selection prompts
- Error handling and recovery patterns
Files: apps/pt-cli/src/utils/port-parser.ts, apps/pt-cli/src/utils/device-utils.ts, apps/pt-cli/src/utils/confirmation.ts

tasks.subject: Update device command index.ts to include add and remove
tasks.description:
Update apps/pt-cli/src/commands/device/index.ts to:
- Import createDeviceAddCommand and createDeviceRemoveCommand
- Add both commands to the device command group
- Ensure proper command hierarchy

tasks.subject: Create link command index.ts with add and remove
tasks.description:
Create apps/pt-cli/src/commands/link/index.ts with:
- Import createLinkAddCommand and createLinkRemoveCommand
- Create link command group
- Add both commands
- Export createLinkCommand function

tasks.subject: Integrate all new commands into main CLI (index.ts)
tasks.description:
Update apps/pt-cli/src/index.ts to:
- Import createLinkCommand
- Import createConfigIosCommand
- Add link command to program
- Add config ios command to program or update existing config
- Ensure proper error handling for all new commands
